name: Dal Dal Dal Dal Sendal Rudal
lore:
Lore of Dal Dal Dal Dal Sendal Rudal
                                    


Dal Dal Dal Dal Sendal Rudal is a marching commander whose sandals double as rockets. He stomps in sync with the “dal dal dal” chant while barking nonsense orders, and editors sync every beat so each step lands like a missile launch inside the meme.
Lyrics
Indonesian (Original)
Dal Dal Dal Dal Rudal Dal Dal Dadal, merupakan makhluk halus yang berbentuk sendal. dulunya dia hanya orang biasa, tetapi karena sering sendal-sendal di masjid, dia dikutuk menjadi sendal. konon katanya kalau ada yang pakai sendal warna putih, ia akan mengajarmu di saat kamu sendiri. TERTAWA JAHAT YANG KERAS maaaaa aku takuuut!
English (Translation)
Dal Dal Dal Dal Rudal Dal Dal Dadal, is a supernatural creature shaped like sandals. He was once just an ordinary person, but because he often stole sandals in the mosque, he was cursed to become sandals. It is said that if anyone wears white sandals, he will chase it when it is alone. LOUD AHH EVIL LAUGH mooooom i am afraid!!
